title: Workflows Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the workflows family — workflow declarations covering decision closure, approvals, hand-offs, and stage-gated transitions. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §17, §18.
